messages.content: TPAMI的投稿要求页数限制是多少

TPAMI（IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence）的页数限制取决于稿件类型（并且以 **IEEE 双栏模板**排版后的页数为准）：

- **Regular paper（常规论文）**：**不超过 12 页**  
- **Short paper（短论文）**：**不超过 8 页**  
- **Comments/Discussion（评论/讨论）**：**不超过 2.5 页**  
- **Survey/Tutorial（综述/教程）**：**不超过 20 页**

通常这些页数上限**包含参考文献**（以及文中所有内容）；如果你告诉我你准备投的类型（Regular/Short/Survey等）和你用的是 LaTeX 还是 Word，我也可以帮你核对你现在排版后是否超页、以及在哪里删最省篇幅。

\begin{table}[ht]
  \centering
  \centering          
  \caption{\textbf{Quantitative Evaluation for Flux.} The best result is highlighted in \textbf{bold}, while the second-best is \underline{underlined}.}
   \resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{
   \begin{tabular}{clccccc}
  \toprule
  \textbf{Resolution}&\textbf{Method}  &\textbf{LPIPS $\downarrow$}&\textbf{PSNR $\uparrow$}&\textbf{SSIM $\uparrow$}&\textbf{Speedup $\uparrow$}&\textbf{Latency ($s$) $\downarrow$} \\
  \midrule
    \multirow{4}{*}{$\mathbf{2048^2}$} &Vanilla HiFlow (Flux) &-&-&-&1.00$\times$&36.20\\
  &+ Uniform Cache&0.4110&15.36&0.6937&1.48$\times$&24.46  \\
  &+ TeaCache []&\underline{0.3099}&\underline{19.87}&\underline{0.7672}&\underline{1.54$\times$}&\underline{23.48}\\
  &\cellcolor{color3}{\textbf{+ FA-Cache (Ours)}}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{0.1836}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{27.30}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{0.8897}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{1.62$\times$}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{22.26}\\    
  \midrule
  \multirow{4}{*}{$\mathbf{4096^2}$} &Vanilla HiFlow (Flux)&-&-&-&1.00$\times$&178.29\\
  &+ Uniform Cache&0.4483&15.58&0.6971&1.46$\times$&122.34  \\
  &+ TeaCache []&\underline{0.3427}&\underline{16.77}&\underline{0.7139}&\underline{1.75$\times$}&\underline{101.76}\\
  &\cellcolor{color3}{\textbf{+ FA-Cache (Ours)}}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{0.2158}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{25.26}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{0.8430}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{1.84$\times$}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{96.89}\\    
  \bottomrule
\end{tabular}    }       
\label{table:quant-cache}  
% \vspace{-1.5em}
\end{table}
  
这个表帮我把所有数据换成xxx

下面把你表格里**所有数值**都替换成 `xxx`（包括分辨率、指标值、倍率、时延等；方法名和加粗/下划线/着色等格式保留）。我也把 `TeaCache []` 里的引用占位保留为 `[]`，你需要的话可再改成 `\cite{}`。

```latex
\begin{table}[ht]
  \centering
  \caption{\textbf{Quantitative Evaluation for Flux.} The best result is highlighted in \textbf{bold}, while the second-best is \underline{underlined}.}
  \resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{
  \begin{tabular}{clccccc}
    \toprule
    \textbf{Resolution}&\textbf{Method}  &\textbf{LPIPS $\downarrow$}&\textbf{PSNR $\uparrow$}&\textbf{SSIM $\uparrow$}&\textbf{Speedup $\uparrow$}&\textbf{Latency ($s$) $\downarrow$} \\
    \midrule
    \multirow{4}{*}{$\mathbf{xxx}$} &Vanilla HiFlow (Flux) &-&-&-&xxx$\times$&xxx\\
    &+ Uniform Cache&xxx&xxx&xxx&xxx$\times$&xxx  \\
    &+ TeaCache []&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx$\times$}&\underline{xxx}\\
    &\cellcolor{color3}{\textbf{+ FA-Cache (Ours)}}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx$\times$}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}\\    
    \midrule
    \multirow{4}{*}{$\mathbf{xxx}$} &Vanilla HiFlow (Flux)&-&-&-&xxx$\times$&xxx\\
    &+ Uniform Cache&xxx&xxx&xxx&xxx$\times$&xxx  \\
    &+ TeaCache []&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx}&\underline{xxx$\times$}&\underline{xxx}\\
    &\cellcolor{color3}{\textbf{+ FA-Cache (Ours)}}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}& \cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx$\times$}&\cellcolor{color3}\textbf{xxx}\\    
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}}
  \label{table:quant-cache}
\end{table}
```

如果你希望把 `-` 也改成 `xxx`（即基线行的缺失值也统一占位），我也可以给你对应版本。
